title: Fisher's Price
description: Revamps fishing to make it more valuable and fun
body:
Do you think fishing is boring and want more reward from doing it? Well, this datapack attempts to do this is a vanilla styled way.

The main goals with this datapack are:
1. To smoothen out the how harsh it can be to get either amazing loot or garbage from fishing
2. To make fishing feel more rewarding when you do get that amazing loot
3. To make some previously non-renewable items renewable by letting you fish in more biomes to get particular items like red sand (badlands), spore blossoms and small dripleaf (lush caves) and tide armor trims (oceans).
